Fundstrat.title: The Clarity Act: Where Crypto's Big Fight Stands
Fundstrat.description:
Sean Farrell, Fundstrat's Head of Digital Asset Strategy, and Tom Block, Fundstrat's Washington Policy Strategist, sat down with Kristin Smith, Miller Whitehouse-Levine, and Colin McLaren of the Solana Policy Institute for an exclusive conversation on where crypto's regulatory fight actually stands.

In this discussion, they covered:

• The Clarity Act endgame: where market structure legislation actually stands, the panel's realistic odds of passage, and why the Senate calendar was the single most important factor at play

• Process over promises: what is happening behind closed doors on the Hill, and what it takes to move a bill from committee to a floor vote

• Beyond the legislation: the rulemaking already underway at the SEC and CFTC, and why the bullish tailwinds do not hinge on a single bill

• Tokenization and derivatives: the outlook for tokenized securities, perpetual futures, and the next wave of regulated crypto products

• The political map: how the midterms could reshape the regulatory landscape for crypto and markets more broadly

• The GENIUS Act at one year: what the landmark stablecoin law has delivered, and what comes next

Conflicts of Interest: The Solana Foundation is a client of Fundstrat and receives Fundstrat's published research reports. The Solana Foundation has commissioned Fundstrat for a specific research project and has permissions to distribute. This event and reports included are intended for research and educational purposes.
